test_name: Explore and Interact with API Endpoints
description: This scenario tests the user's ability to navigate through API endpoints and interact with available operations to understand their functionality.
steps: Navigate to the RoostGPT Test Dashboard.
Locate the 'tag/RoostGPT' link and click it to view related operations.
Expand the 'TestGptController_addTest' operation using the expand button.
Review the parameters and expected response format.
Click the 'POST\n/test' button to simulate sending a test request.
Verify the response and status code displayed.
Expand the operation and review the details.
Click the 'GET\n/test' button to send a test retrieval request.
Verify the response and data returned.
expected_results: Users successfully navigate through API endpoints.
User gains understanding of API operations and parameters.
edge_cases: API endpoint returns an unexpected error code.
Incorrect request parameters result in malformed requests.
User has insufficient permissions for certain operations.
dependencies: API server must be available and responsive.
User account with access to API operations.
Correct configurations for network and firewall.
api_interactions: Monitor API requests made during exploration.
Log responses and status codes from API calls.
Verify correct headers and authentication tokens are used.
performance_metrics: Measure response time for API requests.
Evaluate API server's ability to handle concurrent requests.
Check load times for API documentation pages.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure all interactive elements are accessible via keyboard.
Verify that screen readers can read endpoint details.
Check for color contrast compliance in API documentation.
